name: The Local Pub
description: Generates pure Vibes. Essential for stopping the fans from burning down the boardroom when you go on a losing streak.

name: Greasy Burger Van
description: Questionable meat, premium prices. Boosts Matchday Attendance but costs a bit to bribe the health inspectors.

name: Muddy Training Pitch
description: Where hamstrings go to snap. Provides a flat boost to Club Revenue and your first scraps of Tactical Knowledge.

name: State-of-the-Art Academy
description: Produces the Laptop Gurus. Speeds up your climb up the Career Ladder.

name: Dodgy Medical Room
description: Just a bloke with a magic sponge. Allows units stationed in the city to heal twice as fast.
